hindi: मनोबुद्ध्यहङ्कारचित्तानि नाहं, न च श्रोत्रजिह्वे न च घ्राणनेत्रे।
english: I am not the mind, intellect, ego or memory; not ear, tongue, nose or eye
roman: Mano buddhy ahankara chittani naham, na cha shrotrajihve na cha ghrana netre

hindi: न च व्योमभूमि न तेजो न वायुः, चिदानन्दरूपः शिवोऽहं शिवोऽहम्॥
english: Not sky, earth, fire or wind — I am of the nature of consciousness-bliss, I am Shiva, I am Shiva
roman: Na cha vyoma bhumir na tejo na vayuh, chidananda rupah Shivoham Shivoham

hindi: न च प्राणसंज्ञो न वै पञ्चवायुः, न वा सप्तधातुर्न वा पञ्चकोशः।
english: I am neither the vital breath nor the five airs, neither seven elements nor five sheaths
roman: Na cha prana sangno na vai pancha vayuh, na va sapta dhatur na va pancha koshah

hindi: न वाक्पाणिपादं न चोपस्थपायु, चिदानन्दरूपः शिवोऽहं शिवोऽहम्॥
english: Not speech, hands, feet, nor the organs of procreation and excretion — I am Shiva
roman: Na vakpaani padam na chopastha payu, chidananda rupah Shivoham Shivoham

hindi: न मे द्वेषरागौ न मे लोभमोहौ, मदो नैव मे नैव मात्सर्यभावः।
english: I have no hatred or passion, no greed or delusion, no arrogance or envy
roman: Na me dvesha ragau na me lobha mohau, mado naiva me naiva matsarya bhavah

hindi: न धर्मो न चार्थो न कामो न मोक्षः, चिदानन्दरूपः शिवोऽहं शिवोऽहम्॥
english: Not dharma, not wealth, not desire, not liberation — I am Shiva, I am Shiva
roman: Na dharmo na chartho na kamo na mokshah, chidananda rupah Shivoham Shivoham

hindi: न पुण्यं न पापं न सौख्यं न दुःखं, न मन्त्रो न तीर्थं न वेदा न यज्ञाः।
english: No merit, no sin, no pleasure, no pain, no mantra, no pilgrimage, no Vedas, no yajnas
roman: Na punyam na papam na saukhyam na duhkham, na mantro na tirtham na veda na yagnah

hindi: अहं भोजनं नैव भोज्यं न भोक्ता, चिदानन्दरूपः शिवोऽहं शिवोऽहम्॥
english: I am neither the eating nor the food nor the eater — I am Shiva, I am Shiva
roman: Aham bhojanam naiva bhojyam na bhokta, chidananda rupah Shivoham Shivoham

hindi: न मृत्युर्न शंका न मे जातिभेदः, पिता नैव मे नैव माता न जन्मः।
english: No death, no fear, no distinctions of caste, no father, no mother, no birth for me
roman: Na mrityurna shanka na me jati bhedah, pita naiva me naiva mata na janma

hindi: न बन्धुर्न मित्रं गुरुर्नैव शिष्यः, चिदानन्दरूपः शिवोऽहं शिवोऽहम्॥
english: No kin, no friend, no guru, no disciple — I am of the nature of consciousness-bliss, I am Shiva
roman: Na bandhur na mitram gurur naiva shishyah, chidananda rupah Shivoham Shivoham
